objective: Set up end-to-end observability for a FastAPI + Redis queue system using Prometheus and Grafana, including metrics exposure, scraping, visualization, and preparation for alerting.
decisions: Use FastAPI as backend service exposing /metrics endpoint
Use Redis with RQ for background job queue system
Instrument custom metrics (queue_size, job_success_total, job_failure_total, worker_execution_time_seconds)
Deploy Prometheus and Grafana via Docker Compose
Provision Grafana dashboards via file-based provisioning
Fix docker-compose network configuration using mapping instead of list
Standardize monitoring files under monitoring directory instead of infra duplicates
Proceed to alerting layer (Phase 3.3B) after observability completion
inputs: Metrics generated via Prometheus client library
Grafana provisioning files (datasource.yml, dashboard.yml, JSON dashboards)
outputs: Grafana dashboards: AI Growth OS - Queue Metrics, AI Growth OS - System Metrics
notes: Observability stack is fully operational with metrics flowing from FastAPI to Prometheus and visualized in Grafana. Dashboards are auto-provisioned and working. Remaining work includes alert rule implementation, threshold detection, and system intelligence layer (Phase 3.3B). Duplicate directory structures exist and require consolidation to avoid configuration drift.
